name: K3ysta1
tagline: Cybersecurity, AI Agent, and Full-Stack Notes

intro.headline: Hi, I'm K3ysta1.
intro.description: I focus on cybersecurity, AI Agent exploration, and front-end and back-end development.
intro.supporting: This site is where I organize technical notes, project records, learning summaries, and longer posts as I keep building and researching.

about: I am mainly interested in cybersecurity, AI Agent systems, and full-stack development. I like turning what I learn into reusable notes, whether that comes from security practice, coding projects, or experiments across the front end and back end.

achievements.title: Launch the first version of this blog
Document cybersecurity and AI Agent projects
Keep shipping notes on development and security
